mapper.insert: insert into comp_team ( competition_id, team_name, leader_id, leader_name, teacher_id, teacher_name, invite_code, status, max_members, current_members, del_flag, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{competitionId}, #{teamName}, #{leaderId}, #{leaderName}, #{teacherId}, #{teacherName}, #{inviteCode}, '0', #{maxMembers}, #{currentMembers}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.sql: CASE WHEN NOW() < c.apply_start_time THEN '3' WHEN NOW() BETWEEN c.apply_start_time AND c.apply_end_time THEN '0' WHEN NOW() < c.start_time THEN '3' WHEN NOW() BETWEEN c.start_time AND c.end_time THEN '1' ELSE '2' END
mapper.select: select t.*, c.competition_name, as comp_status, c.category_name, c.category from comp_team t left join competition c on t.competition_id = c.competition_id where t.team_id = #{teamId} and t.del_flag = '0'

select t.*, c.competition_name, as comp_status, c.category_name, c.category from comp_team t left join competition c on t.competition_id = c.competition_id where t.invite_code = #{inviteCode} and t.del_flag = '0' limit 1

select t.*, c.competition_name, as comp_status, c.category_name, c.category, case when t.leader_id = m.user_id then 'leader' else 'member' end as user_role, m.join_time from comp_team t left join competition c on t.competition_id = c.competition_id inner join comp_team_member m on m.team_id = t.team_id and m.del_flag = '0' where t.competition_id = #{competitionId} and m.user_id = #{userId} and t.del_flag = '0' limit 1

select t.*, c.competition_name, as comp_status, c.category_name, c.category, case when t.leader_id = m.user_id then 'leader' else 'member' end as user_role, m.join_time from comp_team t left join competition c on t.competition_id = c.competition_id inner join comp_team_member m on m.team_id = t.team_id and m.del_flag = '0' where m.user_id = #{userId} and t.del_flag = '0' order by m.join_time desc
select id, team_id, user_id, user_name, nick_name, join_time, del_flag from comp_team_member where team_id = #{teamId} and del_flag = '0' order by join_time asc
mapper.update: update comp_team set leader_id = #{newLeaderId}, leader_name = #{newLeaderName}, update_time = sysdate() where team_id = #{teamId} and del_flag = '0'
update comp_team set is_public = #{isPublic}, update_time = sysdate() where team_id = #{teamId}
update comp_team set needed_skills = #{neededSkills}, update_time = sysdate() where team_id = #{teamId}
update comp_team set status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = sysdate() where team_id = #{teamId} and status = '1' and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select:
select t.*, c.competition_name, as comp_status, c.category_name, c.category from comp_team t left join competition c on t.competition_id = c.competition_id where t.del_flag = '0'
AND t.status = #{status}
AND t.team_name like concat('%', #{teamName}, '%')
AND c.competition_name like concat('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
order by t.create_time desc
mapper.update: update comp_team set teacher_id = #{teacherId}, teacher_name = #{teacherName}, update_time = sysdate() where team_id = #{teamId} and teacher_id IS NULL and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select t.*, c.competition_name, as comp_status, c.category_name, c.category from comp_team t left join competition c on t.competition_id = c.competition_id where t.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and t.del_flag = '0' order by t.create_time desc
